title: cSLE1 [JB17001]
extract_protocol_ch1: Briefly, 12,000 cells were loaded for capture onto the Chromium System using the v2 single cell reagent kit (10X Genomics). Following capture and lysis, cDNA was synthesized and amplified (12 cycles) as per manufacturer's protocol (10X Genomics). The amplified cDNA was used to construct an Illumina sequencing library and sequenced on a single lane of a HiSeq 4000.
data_processing: column labels (cell barcodes) of gene expression counts matrix
